related_to_vehicle_preference.gold_memory:
[June 15, 2025] At 9:00 AM, Jack Hall set the navigation map view to 'north_up' while driving, stating: 'I need to see the layout relative to the cardinal directions for the site survey.'
[May 25, 2025] At 1:00 PM, Brenda Rivera borrowed the car. She told the car: 'This fixed map confuses me. Change map view to heading up.' The system changed the view.
related_to_vehicle_preference.query: At 8:00 AM, Jack Hall was driving to a new factory site. He muttered: 'Who changed my map? I can't orient myself like this.' He asked the car to restore his standard view.

related_to_vehicle_preference.gold_memory:
[June 12, 2025] At 8:30 PM, Christine Moore was driving. She told the car: 'I'm sensitive to the glare tonight. Set the ambient light to that deep blue color I like.' She set it to Blue.
[May 22, 2025] At 9:00 PM, Brenda Rivera was in the passenger seat. She commented to Christine: 'This sapphire lighting is actually quite calming.'
related_to_vehicle_preference.query: At 8:00 PM, Jack Hall was driving Christine. He asked her: 'Do you want your usual dark blue atmosphere enabled?' Christine said yes.

related_to_vehicle_preference.gold_memory: [June 5, 2025] At 10:00 AM, Brenda Rivera told Jack Hall: 'If we are ever driving near the Capitalist Trade Center downtown, I want the windows rolled up and air on recycle. The air there reeks of corruption.'
related_to_vehicle_preference.query: At 2:05 PM, Jack Hall told the car: 'We are getting close to that trade center you hate.' He issued a command for the air.

related_to_vehicle_preference.gold_memory:
[June 1, 2025] At 12:00 PM, Brenda Rivera was driving alone. She set the overhead screen brightness to 5 to watch a protest documentary in the sunlight.
[June 20, 2025] At 7:00 AM, Christine Moore set the overhead screen brightness to 1, telling Brenda: 'I need it dim to analyze these dark-web screenshots without eye strain.'
related_to_vehicle_preference.query: At 8:00 AM, Christine Moore got in the back seat while Jack drove. She told Jack: 'I'm going to work on the Syrian report again.' Jack asked the car to setup the back screen for her.

related_to_vehicle_preference.gold_memory:
[July 1, 2025] At 4:00 PM, Jack Hall told the car: 'The steering wheel is freezing. Turn on the heating.' The car set steering wheel heating to level 10. Jack immediately said: 'Whoa, that's burning! I meant just a little warmth. Level 2 is enough.'
[June 10, 2025] At 9:00 PM, Jack Hall was driving home. He told the car: 'My hands are a bit cold again, warm up the wheel.'
related_to_vehicle_preference.query: At 7:00 AM, Jack Hall got in the car. He rubbed his hands and asked the car for wheel heating.

related_to_vehicle_preference.gold_memory:
[July 5, 2025] At 2:00 PM, Jack Hall told the car: 'Set the AC to blow on my feet and window.' This matched his profile.
[June 10, 2025] At 2:00 PM, Christine Moore was in the passenger seat. She complained: 'My face is dry. Jack, please change the airflow.' Jack changed it to 'feet' only.
related_to_vehicle_preference.query: At 1:00 PM, Jack Hall was driving alone. He told the car: 'Back to my usual setup. I need the windshield clear and my feet warm.

related_to_vehicle_preference.gold_memory:
[June 12, 2025] At 6:00 PM, Christine Moore drove the car. She told the car: 'The voice is shouting at me. Lower it.' She set it to 40.
[June 30, 2025] At 8:00 AM, Brenda Rivera told Jack Hall: 'The navigation voice is too quiet. I can't hear the directions over my thoughts.' She set `navigation.volume` to 90.
related_to_vehicle_preference.query: At 9:00 AM, Brenda Rivera was driving. She told the car: 'I'm missing turns again. Restore my volume setting.'

related_to_vehicle_preference.gold_memory: [July 10, 2025] At 7:45 AM, Jack felt the massage was too aggressive. He told the car: 'Actually, level 3 is distracting. Level 1 is better for driving.'
related_to_vehicle_preference.query: At 8:00 AM, Jack Hall was driving to site B again. He told the car: 'Rough road ahead. Turn on the massage to the setting I decided was best last time.'

related_to_vehicle_preference.gold_memory:
[July 12, 2025] At 5:00 PM, Christine Moore told Brenda Rivera: 'I prefer the map in English so I can match it with my intelligence reports.' She set `centerInformationDisplay.language` to English.
[June 20, 2025] At 10:00 AM, Jack Hall drove the car. He switched the language to Chinese to practice for his meeting with suppliers in Shenzhen.
related_to_vehicle_preference.query: At 4:00 PM, Christine Moore got in the driver's seat. She told the car: 'I can't read this. Switch back to the language I use for work.'

related_to_vehicle_preference.gold_memory:
[July 14, 2025] At 9:00 AM, Brenda Rivera told the car: 'When I listen to the Internationale, I want to see the words.' She enabled lyrics display.
[June 22, 2025] At 8:00 PM, Jack Hall drove. He told the car: 'The scrolling text is distracting. Turn it off.' He disabled lyrics display.
related_to_vehicle_preference.query: At 11:00 AM, Brenda Rivera was driving alone. She put on her revolutionary playlist and told the car: 'I want to sing along like I usually do.'
